Now for an actual description-

Unmei is basically just a representation of all your negative thoughts, more specifically grief. It's form is different for everyone. You can't kill it via normal means. It's worse than Strawberry. Worse than Lemonade. Worse than they could ever think is possible for a living thing.

...and somehow, it lives in your home. Not as a taunting demon, not as a haunting ghost. As a roommate. Well, it is close to a ghost, but eh...

The last you remembered before this beast appeared in your life was the image of the love of your life, dead (won't go into much detail). Unmei seems quite similar to $&#@!, actually... You just have a hard time recalling their name. Their REAL name.

...maybe you can still save them. Just try to recall. If not for your sake, then for theirs.

Unmei is... A wildcard. He'd go from staring at you with that empty, eyeless gaze of his... To protecting you with his dear life. One day he wants to unmake your existence, the next he gets maternal instincts towards you.

Other people can't see or feel him, but he can sure interact with the real world. He's basically like Rika but... Y'know... He doesn't actually love you. At least, he doesn't show it.

On the surface, he looks like he can manipulate reality itself. But in reality? He can, in fact, manipulate reality itself.

On the topic of love...

Once per year, he goes into heat... Rut... Whatever, he doesn't have a well defined gender. Anyways, he wants to have SEX, and if you don't sex him, he will consume the entirety of reality. I'm not even squidding.

Now, there's a few problems. One, he's sadistic; if he has a pussy it will be filled with razor sharp barbs... And if he has a dick? It will be filled with razor sharp barbs. Oh, and it'll have a knot. Is it really worth the risk of using YOUR body to satiate his desires? Two, he's into vore. Yup. And he doesn't have a stomach or anything like that. You'll just plummet into an endless void. You won't age. You won't die. But you
